Proprietary Technology — Neural Horizons AI

Zonar OS™.
Your Business,
Running Agentic to Autonomous.

Most businesses manage 12–20 disconnected tools. Revenue falls through the gaps. Zonar OS™ is the single intelligence layer that connects them all — diagnosing problems, orchestrating workflows, and surfacing revenue opportunities before they disappear.

⚡ See Your Revenue Leaks Free 👁 See It In Action →

How Neural Horizons Is Actually Built

Build Your Own Autonomous AI Platform.

This is where we create real value. You don't want to become another Microsoft consultancy. Microsoft — and SAP, Oracle, Salesforce and every other platform you already run — provides the infrastructure. Neural Horizons provides the intelligence layer on top of it.

Microsoft, SAP, Salesforce…
= Operating System
Neural Horizons AI
= Intelligence Operating System
Your Existing Systems & Data
SAP Oracle Microsoft Dynamics HubSpot Salesforce Emails Documents IoT

Zonar OS™ · HALU™ — the layer that sits between your systems and your outcomes

Business Outcomes

We don't replace what you already run — we sit on top of it. Whichever platforms your business is built on, Zonar OS™ and HALU™ are the intelligence layer that turns them from disconnected tools into one system that finds gaps, closes revenue leaks, and acts.

The Average Business Runs on 14 Disconnected Tools.

CRM, email, ads, analytics, finance, support — none of them talk to each other. You get reports, not intelligence. Dashboards, not decisions. Zonar OS™ changes that.

🔴
Before Zonar OS™
  • →Manual weekly reports
  • →Leads falling through cracks
  • →No visibility between teams
  • →Can't identify which channel works
  • →Reactive, not proactive
🟢
After Zonar OS™
  • ✓Live revenue intelligence, 24/7
  • ✓Leads auto-routed & followed up
  • ✓Every dept sees the same truth
  • ✓Attribution across every channel
  • ✓Agents act before revenue leaks
📊
Typical Results
  • ⚡40–60% faster lead response
  • ⚡25–35% conversion rate lift
  • ⚡15+ hrs/week saved per team
  • ⚡ROI typically in 60–90 days
  • ⚡AED 9M+ generated for clients
BUILT INTO ZONAR OS
⚡ HALU™ — Autonomous AI Agent
Every Zonar OS™ deployment includes HALU™ — the autonomous agent that monitors every department, detects revenue leaks and routes action items 24/7, without human intervention.
Meet HALU™ →
The System

Four Modules. One Unified System.

Each module works independently — together, they form a closed-loop revenue intelligence engine.

Module 01

⚡ Revenue Leak Diagnostic

Zonar™ audits your entire revenue operation in 24 hours. It maps your funnel, identifies where leads stall, quantifies the cost of each leak, and ranks opportunities by impact. Not a consultant's opinion — a data-backed diagnosis.

✓Funnel gap analysis across every channel
✓Revenue loss quantified in AED/month
✓Priority fix list ranked by ROI
✓Delivered as your personalised Zonar™ Report
→ Run your free diagnostic now
DIAGNOSTIC REPORT SAMPLE
Lead follow-up gapHIGH
38% of inbound leads receive no follow-up within 24hrs. Estimated cost: AED 22K/mo
Attribution blind spotMED
No cross-channel attribution. Paid spend decisions based on last-click only.
CRM hygiene score64/100
1,240 stale contacts. Recommend re-engagement sequence before Q3 push.
Module 02

🔗 Workflow Orchestration Engine

Zonar OS™ connects your CRM, marketing automation, communication tools, and data sources into one orchestrated system. Leads are routed, tasks are triggered, and follow-ups happen automatically — without anyone manually managing it.

✓CRM + email + ads + ops all connected
✓Lead scoring, routing, and nurture on autopilot
✓Conditional logic handles edge cases automatically
✓Integrates with your existing stack — no rip and replace
→ How Agentic AI powers the engine →
WORKFLOW EXAMPLE — INBOUND LEAD
1
Lead submits form on website
2
Zonar™ scores & segments lead in <30 seconds
3
Personalised email sequence triggered
4
High-value lead → sales rep notified via Slack
5
Deal tracked in CRM — Zonar™ monitors close probability
⏱ Average lead response time: 4.2 minutes vs industry avg 47 hours
Module 03

📊 Intelligence Dashboard

A single source of truth for your entire revenue operation. Not another analytics tool — a command centre that shows you pipeline health, team performance, funnel conversion, and AI agent activity in real time. Accessible on any device.

✓Revenue, pipeline and conversion — live
✓AI-generated weekly performance summary
✓Anomaly alerts before problems escalate
✓Board-ready reports generated automatically
→ Client access: Login to your dashboard
INTELLIGENCE DASHBOARD — THIS WEEK
↑ 34%
Lead-to-call rate
AED 2.1M
Pipeline value
91%
SLA compliance
284
AI tasks ran
🤖 ZONAR WEEKLY SUMMARY
"Pipeline velocity is up 18% vs last week. Recommend increasing capacity for Segment B follow-ups — conversion window is narrowing."
Module 04

🤖 Agentic AI Action Layer

This is where Zonar OS™ goes beyond dashboards. Autonomous AI agents don't just report — they act. They write first-draft emails, qualify leads, update CRM records, flag anomalies, and execute playbook-defined responses without human intervention.

✓Agents execute pre-approved actions autonomously
✓Escalation logic — humans stay in control of what matters
✓Learns from outcomes — improves each cycle
✓Full audit trail — every action logged and explainable
→ Deep-dive: Agentic AI implementation →
AGENT ACTIVITY LOG
✓
Lead qualified — Acme Corp, score 87/100. Assigned to Sarah M. 2 min ago
✓
Nurture email — sent to 14 stalled prospects. Open rate: 41%. 18 min ago
⚠
Escalated — Deal value AED 280K. Requires senior review before next step. 34 min ago
✓
CRM updated — 38 contact records cleaned and enriched. 1 hr ago
Deployment

How You Get Zonar OS™

Zonar OS™ is not a SaaS subscription. It is deployed and configured specifically for your business by the Neural Horizons AI team — customised to your stack, your workflows, your team, and your goals.

1️⃣
Direct Conversation
Zonar™ diagnoses your revenue leaks. You get clarity before committing to anything.
2️⃣
Strategy & Design
We map your transformation architecture and configure Zonar OS™ for your specific stack.
3️⃣
Build & Deploy
Zonar OS™ built, integrated, tested, and deployed. Team trained. Go-live typically 4–6 weeks.
4️⃣
Optimise & Scale
90-day optimisation cycles. Agents improve. Revenue compounds. We stay involved.
Zonar OS™ Deployment
Scoped to your business — every deployment is different
Core build (90-day)
Contact us
one-time · includes HALU™ Pro
Enterprise / full deployment
Contact us
one-time · includes HALU™ Pro + white-label
Ongoing optimisation retainer Custom
💡 Compare to building in-house: 12–18 month timeline and significant dev costs, no consulting expertise. Zonar OS™ is live in 4–6 weeks.
Contact Us Talk to the team →
